case_title: DREW ALTIZER VS. THE POSTAL CHASE, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85. SERVED MAR-09-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE POSTAL CHASE, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $85 SERVED MAR-09-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE POSTAL CHASE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF, DREW ALTIZER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT, THE POSTAL CHASE, INC.,REPRESENTED BY MARYO MOGENNAM IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE POSTAL CHASE, INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ALTIZER, DREW THE POSTAL CHASE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $989.91 FILED BY ALTIZER, DREW AS TO DEFENDANT THE POSTAL CHASE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALTIZER, DREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE POSTAL CHASE, INC. $209.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $324.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
